extract: If you were looking for the town of the same name, see Three Island (town). Three Island (Japanese: ３のしま Island 3), commonly referred to by fans as Kin Island (Japanese: おやこしま Family Island), is the third island in the Sevii Islands archipelago. Its nickname of "Kin Island" refers to how it consists of a larger island (the "parent" island), connected by a bridge to a smaller island (the "child" island). It is east of Two Island. Three Island, like most of the other Sevii Islands, has a town on it, Three Island. It is the most populous town of the seven, but unlike towns in mainland Kanto, it is a very sleepy town. Another oddity of Three Island is that, unlike the other Sevii Islands, the Seagallop ferry port is not within the town itself, but instead in a separate area called Three Isle Port. When the main character in Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen first arrives in town on Three Island, they will have to fight off a gang of rowdy bikers to restore the island to peace. East of the port, a gold miner digs a tunnel, eventually transforming it into Three Isle Path, which opens into a secret area of Three Isle Port where rare Dunsparce live. On the west side of Three Island is the Bond Bridge, which leads to an islet that has a forest growing on it. This Berry Forest contains trees that grow Berries in profusion; however unlike in Hoenn, these Berries cannot be replanted to grow more, but instead regenerate time after time. Children are cautioned against playing in the Berry Forest, as wild Hypno inside the forest have been known to use Hypnosis on children and lead them astray. Lostelle has to be rescued from one of these Hypno.
